abilities.name: Diving Charge
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may be declared while engaged.

abilities.name: Fade Away
abilities.text: Once per activation. When resolving an action that targeted and damaged this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to reduce any damage dealt by 2. Then this model may place into base contact with a model with an Aura (Concealment) token with 12".

actions.name: Paired Knives
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Poisoned Fate
triggers.text: When resolving, the target must discard a card or this action deals +2 damage.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Materialize in Blood
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains marker. Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target and this model may declare the Charge action.

triggers.name: The Fog Rises
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.
